configurations.name: ROS2: Launch Gazebo Sim (nav2_bringup_custom)
configurations.command: source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && source /workspace/install/setup.bash && ros2 launch nav2_bringup_custom gazebo_sim.launch.py

configurations.name: ROS2: Launch Nav2 Bringup (nav2_bringup_custom)
configurations.command: source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && source /workspace/install/setup.bash && ros2 launch nav2_bringup_custom nav2_bringup.launch.py

configurations.name: ROS2: Create World (create_world)
configurations.command: source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && source /workspace/install/setup.bash && ros2 run create_world world_supervisor.py

configurations.name: ROS2: Spawn Robot
configurations.command: source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && source /workspace/install/setup.bash && ros2 launch spawn_robot spawn_robot.launch.py robot_id:=${input:spawnId} x_pose:=${input:xPose} y_pose:=${input:yPose}

setupCommands.description: gdb の Pretty Printing を有効にする
gdb の Pretty Printing を有効にする

setupCommands.description: gdb の Pretty Printing を有効にする
